how: Feed card section order was changed to context header, media or text surface, compact action row, caption, and tags. A lightweight author avatar/meta header, text-only feed frame, and feed-scoped CSS rhythm were added while keeping existing like, comment, and place callbacks intact.
problem: The previous TSK-017 completion treated vertical stream and media-first cards as sufficient, but the original requirement was to keep the JamIssue tone and manner while making the feed feel familiar as an Instagram-like app feed.
why: The feed needed a corrective pass because the current-state review showed the UI still read as a generic web card stack rather than an app-like social feed.
